title: On Soul Fire
description: Makes soul fire actually have unique properties
body:
# On Soul Fire
## Attention! This mod has been discontinued, but every feature in it has been migrated over to [Inferno](https://modrinth.com/mod/inferno). Be sure to check it out if you want to play this mod in newer versions!

Makes entities set on fire by soul fire actually render blue flames. They also take 2 damage instead of 1, like soul
fire does.

## External Links
### Support me on Ko-fi! Any amount is appreciated, and you can get cosmetic benefits for doing so <3
